description: Style Note This wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet. Product Details Black three-fold wallet Has two main compartments, six card slots and two insert pockets  Has a buttoned pocket in the centre to carry coinsBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and Care Genuine leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 11.5 cm x 8.5 cm
